ideation: This sequence aims to depict a baby's playful arm movements.  The movements will be somewhat uncoordinated, reflecting a baby's lack of fine motor control. We'll use a mix of small, jerky motions and slightly larger, more sweeping gestures, alternating between arms to emphasize the playful, unpredictable nature of a baby's actions.  The arms will not have a consistent pattern, but instead will move somewhat randomly to convey the feeling of a baby discovering its limbs. We will not have the arms in a consistent pose, but instead use random movements to simulate the feeling of a baby discovering its limbs. The frames will feature slightly irregular wrist positions to add to the natural, unsynchronized movements of the baby.

frames.beat: baby arms flail outwards, exploring the world
arms cross and reach, a playful grab
a gentle sway, testing new movements
both arms settle, a moment of quiet discovery
